summary: Vertical video, 8 seconds. POTUS retweet of the clip of President Trump boarding Air Force One, pausing to wave, and entering the plane, with a 'President Trump Departs For China' text card. It has no dialogue and a background music bed. It is a single continuous shot with no rapid cutting and no added editing effects.
notable_text: On-screen title card: 'President Trump Departs For China'
